mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNBANNER WHERE 1=1
AND BANNER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT BANNER_ID, BANNER_NM, LINK_URL, BANNER_IMAGE, BANNER_IMAGE_FILE, BANNER_DC, SORT_ORDR, REFLCT_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, DATE_FORMAT(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM LETTNBANNER WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}
SELECT BANNER_IMAGE_FILE, LINK_URL FROM LETTNBANNER WHERE REFLCT_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDR
SELECT B.FILE_STRE_COURS AS FILE_STRE_COURS, B.STRE_FILE_NM AS STRE_FILE_NM FROM LETTNBANNER A, LETTNFILEDETAIL B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.BANNER_ID = #{bannerId} AND A.BANNER_IMAGE_FILE = B.ATCH_FILE_ID
